response.original_title: De DVD avonturen van Ome Henk
response.overview: Uncle Henk Stubbe is a grumpy and antisocial man in his fifties who lives on welfare because he receives no money from his manager, Koos Korswagen. Uncle Henk is very hot-tempered and lashes out at the slightest provocation. He also frequently finds himself in precarious situations, sometimes without having asked for them, but usually because he makes no effort to avoid them. He almost always attempts to resolve these situations with violence. He also often thinks that he does everything right and that others do everything wrong, while he is actually the troublemaker.
response.title: The DVD Adventures of Uncle Henk
